text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, as I'm heading to the track to do
training preparations...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter? Didn't get much sleep? You're
the one who asked me to train with you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I was up all night reading fan letters.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh, fan letters, huh? Did you get anything out of
them?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...No. In fact, they left me feeling puzzled.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I know fans are important and I really appreciate
their support...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But I'm not sure what I can do in return...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I see... Let me ask you something, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Did any of the letters actually ask you to do
something?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Um... Well, I'm not sure exactly.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I think you'd better take another, closer look at
them.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm sure you'll get it then.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah, okay. I'll pay closer attention to them. Thanks... Yawn.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Please do, but also make sure you get enough
sleep. Your fans will be disappointed if they see
you looking sloppy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she sees Silence Suzuka stifle another yawn, a
gentle smile spreads across Air Groove's face.
